title: ASR Outdoor Full Tang Hunting Knife ABS Handle Fixed Blade Space Galaxy Design
description:
Be prepared while hunting or camping with the ASR Outdoor 11" Full Tang Hunting Knife! This fixed blade features a tough ergonomic ABS handle for added comfort and resistance so you don't need to worry about it slipping. The blade itself measures 6.25" while the handle is 4.75", making this knife ideal for travel whether you're hunting, fishing or exploring in the wilderness. It's constructed of durable 3CR13 stainless steel so it wont rust, and the blade itself features a cool galaxy finish design. The knife also comes with a sturdy nylon sheath to protect it when not in use. The sheath features a loop so you can easily hang it from your belt, backpack or outdoor gear. This is a must-have utility knife for hunters, avid campers and collectors alike.
